title: Blog: Avatar + Switch
code:
<gds-flex align-items="center" width="100%" height="100%" justify-content="center" gap="4xl">
   <gds-avatar-group aria-label="Extra small avatars">
        <gds-avatar
          src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?img=1"
          size="xs"
          alt="Person 1"
        ></gds-avatar>
        <gds-avatar
          src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?img=2"
          size="xs"
          alt="Person 2"
        ></gds-avatar>
        <gds-avatar
          src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?img=3"
          size="xs"
          alt="Person 3"
        ></gds-avatar>
        <gds-avatar
          src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?img=4"
          size="xs"
          alt="Person 4"
        ></gds-avatar>
        <gds-avatar
          src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?img=5"
          size="xs"
          alt="Person 5"
        ></gds-avatar>
        <gds-avatar
          src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?img=6"
          size="xs"
          alt="Person 6"
        ></gds-avatar>
        <gds-avatar size="xs">+5</gds-avatar>
      </gds-avatar-group>

      <gds-switch size="small" label="Switch"></gds-switch>
</gds-flex>
